title: App Settings - Navigation
scenario: Verify navigation within Poly Studio Mobile app settings menu using hamburger icon, tab selection, back icon, and swipe gesture
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap the hamburger icon (☰) to open the Poly Studio Menu (App Settings).
3. Tap any settings tab (e.g., Device Settings, Audio Settings, Notifications, Account) to view the corresponding settings screen.
4. Tap the back icon ('<') to return to the main menu.
5. Tap the same tab again to re-enter the settings screen.
6. Swipe right from the left edge of the screen to return to the main menu.
7. Repeat steps 3–6 for all available settings tabs (Device Settings, Audio Settings, Notifications, Account, etc.).
expected: User can access every settings tab and successfully navigate back to the main Home screen using both the back icon and the swipe-right gesture.
